39A.title: Financial、Billing与Commercial Operations
39A.theme: 多租户计量、Usage Ledger、价格、套餐、合同、订单、发票、税务、Revenue Recognition、Credit、Collection与商业运营

39B.title: Payment、Treasury与Financial Risk Operations
39B.theme: Payment Orchestration、PSP／银行连接、Virtual Account、Cash Application、Refund／Chargeback、FX、Liquidity、Cash Forecast、Bank Reconciliation、Fraud与Treasury Control

39C.title: Finance Analytics、Planning与Unit Economics
39C.theme: MRR／ARR、Revenue Bridge、Cohort、Gross Margin、Cost Allocation、Budget、Forecast、Scenario、Variance、Pricing Analytics、Customer Profitability与Executive Finance Cockpit

skills.name: financial-billing-commercial-operations-orchestrator
skills.description: Implement Batch 39A end to end: metering, usage ledger, catalog, pricing, contracts, orders, subscriptions, billing, tax, invoices, AR, credit, collections, revenue recognition, subledgers, commercial operations and release gates.

skills.name: multi-tenant-metering-event-contract-and-usage-ledger
skills.description: Implement tenant-bound metering events, producer contracts, immutable usage ledger, idempotency, correction events, event-time semantics, partitioning, replay and audit.

skills.name: meter-definition-dimension-aggregation-correction-and-data-quality
skills.description: Implement versioned meters, units, dimensions, aggregation windows, late data, estimates, corrections, completeness, anomaly detection and certified usage aggregates.

skills.name: product-catalog-price-book-plan-rate-card-entitlement-discount-and-promotion
skills.description: Implement versioned products, SKUs, features, plans, price books, rate cards, tiers, entitlements, discounts, promotions, floors, approvals and effective dating.

skills.name: quote-cpq-contract-amendment-commitment-minimum-and-approval
skills.description: Implement CPQ quotes, commercial proposals, signed contracts, amendments, commitments, minimum spend, ramp schedules, approvals, signatures and contract lineage.

skills.name: order-subscription-provisioning-entitlement-lifecycle-and-orchestration
skills.description: Implement orders, order lines, subscriptions, changes, renewals, cancellations, provisioning, fulfilment, entitlements and reconciliation.

skills.name: rating-charging-billing-period-invoice-line-and-adjustment-engine
skills.description: Implement deterministic rating, tiering, minimums, commitments, proration, billing periods, charges, invoice lines, adjustments, re-rating and reproducibility.

skills.name: tax-determination-registration-nexus-vat-gst-sales-tax-withholding-and-einvoicing
skills.description: Implement jurisdiction-aware tax determination, registrations, nexus, place of supply, VAT/GST/sales tax, exemptions, reverse charge, withholding, tax evidence, provider adapters and versioned rules.

skills.name: invoice-document-en16931-peppol-credit-note-delivery-and-acceptance
skills.description: Implement legal invoice documents, numbering, EN 16931 and Peppol profiles, local CIUS, credit/debit notes, delivery, responses, acceptance, migration and document evidence.

skills.name: accounts-receivable-payment-allocation-refund-dispute-and-dunning
skills.description: Implement receivables, payments, allocations, refunds, chargebacks, disputes, unapplied cash, dunning, promises to pay, statements and reconciliation.

skills.name: credit-policy-limit-risk-deposit-collection-writeoff-and-bad-debt
skills.description: Implement customer credit profiles, limits, risk signals, guarantees, deposits, overrides, collection cases, legal escalation, write-offs and bad-debt accounting.

skills.name: revenue-recognition-ifrs15-asc606-performance-obligation-allocation-and-schedule
skills.description: Implement versioned IFRS 15 and ASC 606 accounting policies, revenue contracts, performance obligations, transaction price, variable consideration, SSP, allocation, satisfaction and revenue schedules.

skills.name: contract-asset-liability-deferred-revenue-unbilled-ar-and-financial-subledger
skills.description: Implement billing and revenue subledgers, contract assets and liabilities, deferred revenue, unbilled AR, journal rules, accounting periods, posting and GL export.

skills.name: commercial-operations-renewal-expansion-churn-forecast-and-revenue-assurance
skills.description: Implement commercial operations for renewals, expansions, contraction, churn, commitments, forecasts, leakage detection, revenue assurance and action workflows.

skills.name: billing-finance-reconciliation-period-close-audit-evidence-and-reporting
skills.description: Implement reconciliations from usage to GL, period-close checklists, subledger certification, variance explanations, audit evidence, disclosures and financial reporting.

skills.name: financial-commercial-security-quality-chaos-and-release-gates
skills.description: Implement financial invariants, property tests, billing simulations, tax and eInvoice conformance, journal balancing, close tests, provider chaos, security, privacy, scale and mandatory release gates.

skills.name: payment-treasury-financial-risk-operations-orchestrator
skills.description: Implement Batch 39B end to end: payment facts, PSP and bank connectors, routing, virtual accounts, cash application, refunds, chargebacks, statements, FX, liquidity, cash forecasting, fraud, treasury controls, operations and release gates.

skills.name: unified-payment-intent-instruction-attempt-settlement-and-cash-movement-domain
skills.description: Implement provider-neutral payment intents, instructions, attempts, authorizations, captures, settlements, returns and immutable cash movements.

skills.name: psp-bank-payment-rail-connector-capability-authentication-and-lifecycle
skills.description: Implement provider-neutral PSP, bank and payment-rail connectors with capability discovery, authentication, versions, webhooks, polling, files, ISO 20022 and reconciliation.

skills.name: payment-routing-orchestration-fee-sla-retry-idempotency-and-failover
skills.description: Implement explainable payment routing, provider scoring, fees, FX, risk, limits, SLA, retry classification, idempotency, circuit breakers and duplicate-safe failover.

skills.name: beneficiary-bank-account-virtual-account-mandate-and-verification-of-payee
skills.description: Implement beneficiaries, bank accounts, virtual accounts, direct-debit mandates, ownership evidence, Verification of Payee, risk reviews and lifecycle controls.

skills.name: cash-application-remittance-matching-allocation-and-unapplied-cash
skills.description: Implement cash-application rules, remittance parsing, candidate matching, confidence, allocations, unapplied cash, deductions, short pays and reconciliation.

skills.name: refund-reversal-return-chargeback-dispute-and-representment
skills.description: Implement refunds, payment reversals, bank returns, card chargebacks, disputes, evidence, representment, financial postings and duplicate-loss controls.

skills.name: bank-statement-iso20022-camt-bai2-ingestion-and-reconciliation
skills.description: Implement bank-statement ingestion for ISO 20022 camt, BAI2, MT940 and APIs, immutable entries, balance validation, normalization, cash matching and bank reconciliation.

skills.name: fx-market-data-quote-trade-hedge-settlement-revaluation-and-exposure
skills.description: Implement FX market data, quotes, spot/forward/swap trades, confirmations, settlements, economic hedges, revaluation, exposure and counterparty risk.

skills.name: treasury-bank-account-liquidity-pooling-sweep-limit-and-funding
skills.description: Implement treasury bank-account inventory, balance positions, liquidity, cash pooling, sweeps, buffers, facilities, funding, limits and intercompany movements.

skills.name: cash-forecast-scenario-variance-confidence-and-liquidity-planning
skills.description: Implement short-, medium- and long-term cash forecasts, scenarios, source confidence, liquidity planning, variance and forecast governance.

skills.name: payment-fraud-risk-signal-rule-model-decision-case-and-step-up
skills.description: Implement payment-fraud signals, rules, models, decisions, 3DS and step-up, velocity, beneficiary risk, cases, privacy and feedback.

skills.name: treasury-mandate-signer-approval-segregation-limit-and-payment-factory-control
skills.description: Implement bank mandates, signers, approval matrices, segregation of duties, payment limits, payment files, payment factory, emergency payments and bank-portal reconciliation.

skills.name: payment-security-pci-tokenization-pan-vault-encryption-key-and-secret-boundary
skills.description: Implement payment-data classification, PCI scope, tokenization, PAN vault adapters, encryption, key lifecycle, redaction, access, evidence and third-party responsibility.

skills.name: payment-treasury-operations-cockpit-position-reconciliation-fraud-and-sla
skills.description: Implement payment and treasury operational dashboards, cash positions, unknown payments, reconciliation, fraud, liquidity, forecasts, limits, SLA, cases and actions.

skills.name: payment-treasury-conformance-security-chaos-performance-and-release-gates
skills.description: Implement payment, bank, statement, cash application, refund, chargeback, FX, liquidity, fraud, treasury-control, PCI, chaos, scale and release-gate tests.

skills.name: finance-analytics-planning-unit-economics-orchestrator
skills.description: Implement Batch 39C end to end: finance semantics, recurring revenue, bridges, cohorts, margin, cost allocation, budgeting, forecasting, variance, pricing analytics, profitability, reporting, workflow and release gates.

skills.name: finance-semantic-layer-kpi-registry-definition-lineage-and-restatement
skills.description: Implement versioned finance metrics, grains, measures, dimensions, accounting classifications, currency bases, snapshots, lineage, certification and restatements.

skills.name: mrr-arr-acv-tcv-bookings-billings-revenue-and-recurring-metric-engine
skills.description: Implement reproducible recurring-revenue and commercial metrics with eligibility, normalization, commitments, usage, currency, contract and subscription states.

skills.name: revenue-bridge-new-expansion-contraction-churn-reactivation-and-fx-waterfall
skills.description: Implement deterministic recurring-revenue bridges, movement classification, precedence, contract migrations, FX separation, reconciliation and drill-down.

skills.name: cohort-retention-grr-nrr-survival-and-customer-lifecycle-analytics
skills.description: Implement fixed cohorts, logo and revenue retention, GRR, NRR, survival, censoring, lifecycle stages and cohort drill-down.

skills.name: gross-margin-cogs-contribution-margin-and-cost-classification
skills.description: Implement revenue and cost classifications, COGS, gross margin, contribution margin, product cost policies, restatements and reconciliations.

skills.name: focus-cost-ingestion-shared-cost-allocation-showback-chargeback-and-unit-cost
skills.description: Implement FOCUS and vendor-cost ingestion, direct assignment, shared pools, allocation drivers, showback, chargeback, unit costs and reconciliation.

skills.name: budget-driver-based-planning-workforce-capex-opex-and-version-control
skills.description: Implement annual and multi-year budgets, operating drivers, workforce, capacity, capex, opex, cash, approvals, locks and version control.

skills.name: rolling-forecast-scenario-assumption-sensitivity-confidence-and-stress-test
skills.description: Implement rolling forecasts, forecast models, assumptions, overrides, scenarios, sensitivities, confidence intervals, stress tests and liquidity impacts.

skills.name: variance-price-volume-mix-fx-timing-rate-and-driver-analysis
skills.description: Implement actual-to-budget and actual-to-forecast variance, price-volume-mix, FX, timing, rate, headcount, cost and driver decomposition with reconciliation.

skills.name: pricing-analytics-packaging-discount-waterfall-elasticity-and-experiment
skills.description: Implement price realization, discount waterfalls, packaging analysis, elasticity estimates, willingness-to-pay studies, experiments and governed recommendations.

skills.name: customer-product-segment-profitability-ltv-cac-payback-and-cost-to-serve
skills.description: Implement customer, product and segment profitability, cost-to-serve, allocated margin, LTV, CAC, payback, account hierarchies and drill-down.

skills.name: finance-actual-plan-forecast-reconciliation-close-and-management-reporting
skills.description: Implement actual-plan-forecast reconciliation, preliminary and final periods, close integration, management reporting, segment reconciliations and report restatements.

skills.name: executive-finance-cockpit-ifrs18-mpm-board-pack-and-narrative
skills.description: Implement executive finance dashboards, IFRS 18 management-performance-measure governance, board packs, metric reconciliation, drivers, risks and evidence-backed narratives.

skills.name: finance-planning-workflow-owner-review-approval-lock-and-collaboration
skills.description: Implement planning submissions, ownership, comments, approvals, segregation of duties, locks, reopen, change requests and collaboration evidence.

skills.name: finance-analytics-quality-security-performance-and-release-gates
skills.description: Implement metric, bridge, cohort, margin, allocation, planning, forecast, variance, pricing, profitability, cockpit, security and performance release tests.
